query.description: SQL query string, may contain :paramName tokens

type.description: type of the visualization (default is table)

anyOf.description: list of column names in the x axis (for non-pivot chart types)
list of column names in the y axis (for non-pivot chart types). When dualAxis is enabled in axisConfig, these are the left-axis columns.
list of column names for the right Y axis (only used when axisConfig.dualAxis is true)
additional columns to show in chart tooltips without changing grouping or series structure

aggFunction.description: aggregation function to apply (SUM, AVG, COUNT, MIN, MAX)

anyOf.description: compact heatmap mode: hides cell values, shows only colored squares with tooltips, and uses smaller cells — like a GitHub contribution graph
heatmap color scale: 'red-yellow-green' (default), 'green' (single-hue like GitHub), 'blue' (single-hue blue)
which dimension level to match (0=top-level, 1=second level, etc.). Defaults to 0.
parent dimension values to scope the formula when dimensionLevel > 0, e.g. ['PnL'] means only match within the PnL group
formulas combining top-level row dimension values
which dimension level to match (0=top-level, 1=second level, etc.). Defaults to 0.
parent dimension values to scope the formula when dimensionLevel > 0, e.g. ['PnL'] means only match within the PnL group
formulas combining top-level column dimension values

pivotConfig.description: pivot table configuration (only used when type is 'pivot')

anyOf.description: display name override for the column header
number of decimal places (0-4) for numeric columns

date display format as a Unicode date pattern, e.g. 'yyyy-MM-dd', 'MM/dd/yyyy', 'dd/MM/yyyy', 'MMM dd, yyyy', "MMM'yy", 'yyyy', 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm', 'HH:mm:ss'. Tokens: yyyy (4-digit year), yy (2-digit year), MMMM (full month), MMM (short month), MM (month number), dd (day), HH (hours 24h), mm (minutes), ss (seconds).
string to prepend to displayed values (e.g. '$', '€')
string to append to displayed values (e.g. '%', ' units', 'k')
per-column display formatting keyed by column name. Only set when user asks to rename columns, change decimal places, or change date format. Good defaults are applied automatically.
color overrides mapping series index to color key (e.g. {'0': 'danger', '2': 'warning'}).
point marker size for charts that render markers, such as scatter and line
whether bar and area series should be stacked. Defaults to true for those chart types.
show numeric value labels on each data point. Defaults to false.

styleConfig.description: shared visual styling for the chart, such as colors, opacity, and marker size.

x.description: X-axis value to anchor the annotation to

anyOf.description: series name to anchor the annotation to
annotations for cartesian charts. Each annotation specifies x, series, and text.
deprecated legacy color overrides. Use styleConfig.colors instead.
optional Y-axis title override for charts with a single Y axis
enable dual Y-axis mode. When true, yRightCols in VizSettings determines which columns go on the right axis.

axisConfig.description: axis configuration for scale type (linear or log). Only set when user explicitly requests log scale.

anyOf.description: which periods to compare: 'last' (default, last vs second-to-last) or 'previous' (second-to-last vs third-to-last, skips partial current period)

trendConfig.description: trend chart configuration (only used when type is 'trend')

anyOf.description: numeric value column for fill color
numeric value column for bubble sizing (optional)
column for coloring points by value (categorical or numeric)
minimum circle radius in pixels (default 5, range 1-20)

geoConfig.description: geo map configuration (only used when type is 'geo')

assets.description: ordered list of questions in the dashboard
